title: WebSocket connection fails due to HTTP authentication
symptom: Users experience 'failed HTTP authentication' errors in the browser console when trying to connect via WebSocket. This results in a 'Connection Lost' message.
applies_when: Using n8n in a Docker environment
root_cause: The WebSocket connection requires proper HTTP authentication, which may not be correctly configured when using a reverse proxy like Nginx Proxy Manager. If the authentication settings are incorrect or missing, the connection will fail.
fix_steps: Ensure Nginx Proxy Manager is properly configured to handle WebSocket connections
Verify that the authentication settings in n8n are correct
agent_instruction: Check and configure the Nginx Proxy Manager settings for WebSocket support.
